scoringPlays.text: Zavion Thomas 23 Yd pass from Garrett Nussmeier (Damian Ramos Kick)

Dashawn Spears 58 Yd Interception Return (Damian Ramos Kick)

videos.headline: Florida Gators vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights
videos.description: Florida Gators vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida Gators vs. LSU Tigers: Full Highlights) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 3 Tigers, Garrett Nussmeier claw through the Gators
videos.description: Nussmeier throws for 220 yards and a touchdown while Zavion Thomas secures a receiving TD to lead LSU to a 20-10 victory against Florida.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trey Smack kicks 45-yard field goal) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's Dashawn Spears picks off DJ Lagway
videos.description: Dashawn Spears jumps in front of DJ Lagway's pass to give LSU the ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Dashawn Spears picks off DJ Lagway) 2025/09/13 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Damian Ramos kicks 47-yard field goal) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's Whit Weeks ejected for targeting
videos.description: Whit Weeks is ejected in the first quarter of the LSU-Florida game for leading with the crown of the helmet.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Whit Weeks ejected for targeting ) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: LSU's Garrett Nussmeier connects with Zavion Thomas for a 23-yard TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier hits Zavion Thomas in the back of the end zone to give LSU a 10-3 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LSU's Garrett Nussmeier connects with Zavion Thomas for a 23-yard TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida's Aidan Mizell makes an amazing catch for a TD
videos.description: DJ Lagway throws it up to Aidan Mizell, who hauls in an incredible touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida's Aidan Mizell makes an amazing catch for a TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Lagway throws 2nd pick of 1st half for Florida
videos.description: DJ Lagway throws into double coverage and LSU's A.J. Haulcy picks it off.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Lagway throws 2nd pick of 1st half for Florida) 2025/09/13 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Damian Ramos makes 45-yard field goal) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Kelly gets toppled over during skirmish on the sideline
videos.description: Brian Kelly gets trucked as a fight breaks out on the LSU sideline.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brian Kelly gets toppled over during skirmish on the sideline) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Lagway's 3rd INT goes for a pick-six
videos.description: DJ Lagway is picked off for a third time and Dashawn Spears takes it back to house for a 20-10 LSU lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Lagway's 3rd INT goes for a pick-six) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Lagway throws his 4th INT
videos.description: DJ Lagway overthrows his receiver and Tamarcus Cooley is there to pick it off in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Lagway throws his 4th INT) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Florida's DJ Lagway throws his 5th INT late in the 4th quarter
videos.description: DJ Lagway runs around, throws the ball up and it's picked off by LSU's DJ Pickett.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Florida's DJ Lagway throws his 5th INT late in the 4th quarter) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brian Kelly details how LSU persevered in the 'SEC battle' vs. Florida
videos.description: Kelly expresses his pride in the Tigers' defensive performance and explains how they were able to keep their momentum high through all four quarters to defeat the Gators.

videos.headline: Brian Kelly snaps at reporter after question about LSU's offense
videos.description: LSU coach Brian Kelly was fed up with the opening question at his news conference about the offense after the Tigers' 20-10 win over Florida.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Presser (Brian Kelly snaps at reporter after question about LSU's offense) 2025/09/14 ESHEET
